## Lifecycle

Current state is managed by the Librarian extension registry. Run `librarian_extension_list` or `librarian_capability_projection` to see current lifecycle state.

## Capabilities

## Architecture Notes

This document is generated by the Librarian documentation projection system. Content outside the generated section is human-authored and preserved across regeneration cycles.

To regenerate this document:

```bash
librarian_documentation_generate \
  --type extension_status \
  --extension-id {{extension_id}} \
  --output-path docs/EXTENSION-STATUS.md
```

To check if this document reflects current state:

```bash
librarian_documentation_drift_check \
  --file-path docs/EXTENSION-STATUS.md
```
